revision.comment: and this is why pulling from WD is dumb - completely unnecessary duplication of hideous code just to make people happy
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Text replacement - "Category:{" to "Category:"
Adding [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-26]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing redirects 1-26]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Refreshing imports]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[CAtegory:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "rank" to "Rank"
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:New]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Ambox transclusions]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
avoid redirects by updating EditOnWikidata to Edit on Wikidata
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Copying from [[Category:S that add a tracking category]] to [[Category:reimport]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: wrap 12 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24221752933|time triggered pipeline]]
avoid redirects by updating EditOnWikidata to Edit on Wikidata
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
1 revision imported: en
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
